steps.data:
<?php
/**
 * ODD Playground demo defaults.
 *
 * This file is written only by the Playground blueprint. It keeps normal
 * installs untouched while making fresh demos boot straight into ODD:
 * the animated wallpaper is pre-selected and the Control Panel opens
 * once per browser session after WP Desktop Mode is ready.
 */
add_filter( 'desktop_mode_default_wallpaper', static function () {
	return 'odd';
} );

add_action( 'admin_footer', static function () {
	?>
	<script>
	( function () {
		'use strict';
		var key = 'odd-playground-opened-control-panel';
		try {
			if ( window.sessionStorage && window.sessionStorage.getItem( key ) ) {
				return;
			}
		} catch ( e ) {}

		function markOpened() {
			try {
				if ( window.sessionStorage ) {
					window.sessionStorage.setItem( key, '1' );
				}
			} catch ( e ) {}
		}

		function openOddPanel() {
			var desktop = window.wp && window.wp.desktop;
			if ( ! desktop || typeof desktop.registerWindow !== 'function' ) {
				return false;
			}
			try {
				desktop.registerWindow( { id: 'odd' } );
				markOpened();
				return true;
			} catch ( e ) {
				return false;
			}
		}

		function openWhenReady() {
			var tries = 0;
			function attempt() {
				if ( openOddPanel() || tries++ > 40 ) {
					return;
				}
				window.setTimeout( attempt, 250 );
			}
			attempt();
		}

		var desktop = window.wp && window.wp.desktop;
		if ( desktop && typeof desktop.ready === 'function' ) {
			desktop.ready( openWhenReady );
		} else {
			window.setTimeout( openWhenReady, 500 );
		}
	} )();
	</script>
	<?php
} );
